turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Hey, thanks for calling. How can I help?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Hi, I'm interested in your marketing services.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Great! Can I get your name?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Sure, I'm Marcus Webb.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Nice to meet you Marcus. What kind of marketing are you looking for?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: We mainly need help with social media and maybe some paid ads.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Awesome. What's your budget for this?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: We haven't really set a firm number, maybe around $800 a month?

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Oh okay, got it. And when are you hoping to start?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Probably in the next couple of months.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Sounds good! I'll pass your info along to our team and someone will reach out.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Okay, but how will they reach me? You didn't take my email or anything.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Oh right, sorry about that! What's your email?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: It's marcus@webbco.com.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Perfect, got it. We'll be in touch!

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Hello, this is a reminder call from Riverside Medical. May I speak with Jordan Kim?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: This is Jordan.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Hi Jordan! Just calling to remind you about your appointment tomorrow at 2:30 PM at our Main Street clinic.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Oh, I totally forgot. I actually can't make it at 2:30 tomorrow.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: No worries! We have an opening Thursday at 10:00 AM or Friday at 3:00 PM. Either of those work?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Friday at 3 works for me.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Great, I've rescheduled you for Friday May 24th at 3:00 PM at our Main Street location.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Do I need to do anything to prepare?

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: You'll want to fast for at least 8 hours before the appointment and bring your insurance card.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Got it, thanks.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: You're all set Jordan. See you Friday!
